description: Claude command registry for Ben's toolkit

IQUEST.instructions: Research the topic, generate questions following the IQUEST schema, fetch the latest shell from shells/IQUEST_Shell.jsx, inject questions, output as JSX artifact

IQUESTLOOP.description: Iterate IQUEST until no questions remain or user says stop

IGUIDE.description: Step-by-step interactive guide with NEXT STEP and STUCK buttons
IGUIDE.instructions: Generate step-by-step guide as JSX using the IGUIDE shell from shells/IGUIDE_Shell.jsx

RECAP.description: Structured summary of active tools, pending decisions, and next actions

HELP.description: List available commands with one-line descriptions — works offline from memory

STATUS.description: Ping GitHub registry, report command availability and any stale definitions

HANDOFF.description: Generate a zip package of all active artifacts and context for continuing in a new chat

SPRINT.description: Break a build request into an explicit plan, show it, execute one step at a time with approval between steps
